scripts.build:
rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && for dir in bsa gdp heparin predicted-hct lbm timecalc z-score quick-reference cannula-pressure-drop priming-volume unit-converter admin/feedback; do mkdir -p "dist/$dir"; done && cp index.html dist/ && cp main.js dist/ && cp _redirects dist/ && cp favicon.svg dist/ && mkdir -p dist/data && cp data/cannula-pressure-drop.json dist/data/ && for page in bsa gdp heparin predicted-hct lbm timecalc z-score quick-reference cannula-pressure-drop priming-volume unit-converter; do cp "$page/index.html" "dist/$page/"; done && cp admin/feedback/index.html dist/admin/feedback/ && printf 'User-agent: *
Allow: /
Sitemap: https://perfusiontools.com/sitemap.xml
' > dist/robots.txt && node generate-sitemap.js
scripts.test: node tests/phn.test.js && node tests/priming-volume.test.js && node tests/feedback-api.test.js && node tests/cannula-pressure-drop.test.js
